spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to align with the target JDK.
spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Java 8 properties will cause build failures or runtime incompatibilities with the new parent POM.

spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM version from 1.4.0.RELEASE to 3.3.13.
spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.4 is incompatible with Java 17 and lacks the necessary APIs for modern Spring Boot 3 features; the application will fail to compile or start without this upgrade.

spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency management for spring-data-rest-hal-browser to resolve version conflicts in Spring Boot 3.
spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 may not manage the version of this specific dependency correctly or it might have been removed/changed in the BOM, leading to missing class errors or version mismatches at runtime.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with lambda DSL configuration for Spring Security 6.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors if extended.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity configuration to use lambda DSL and replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 6 and removed in later versions; the fluent API structure changed significantly.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add static import for Customizer.withDefaults required by new Spring Security 6 API.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: The new httpBasic() method requires a Customizer argument; without the import, the code will not compile.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertions to JUnit 5 Jupiter assertions.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not part of the JUnit 5 API; tests will fail to compile or run if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed or if the test runner expects JUnit 5.
JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine; setup methods will not execute without migration.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner and replace with native JUnit 5 support.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; the JUnit 4 runner (@RunWith) is incompatible and causes test execution failures.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot test port annotation package for Spring Boot 3.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: The package org.springframework.boot.context.embedded was removed in Spring Boot 3; the class moved to org.springframework.boot.test.web.server.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate static assertion imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is part of JUnit 4 and is not available or compatible with JUnit 5 test runners; tests will fail to compile or run if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate @Test annotation from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: org.junit.Test is JUnit 4; JUnit 5 requires org.junit.jupiter.api.Test for test discovery and execution.
org.junit.runner.RunWith and SpringRunner are JUnit 4 constructs; Spring Boot 3.x with JUnit 5 uses @SpringBootTest or @WebMvcTest without explicit runners.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 Spring runner class import.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: SpringRunner is a JUnit 4 runner; it is not needed and may cause conflicts or compilation errors in a JUnit 5 environment.
@RunWith(SpringRunner.class) is JUnit 4 specific; JUnit 5 does not use @RunWith, and its presence may cause compilation errors if the annotation is not found or conflicts with JUnit 5 engine.
